def negative_set_created_per_iteration_same_elements():
    rule_id = "set_created_per_iteration_same_elements"
    family = "hot_path_ext"
    severity = "info"
    status = "stable"
    intent = "shows the preferred shape that should not trigger this rule"
    description = "A set with the same elements is rebuilt on each iteration instead of being hoisted."
    return rule_id, family, severity, status, intent, description
